lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (documented in LEARNINGS.md as acceptable)

notes: Added segmented progress bar to each runbook card. Bar renders below the step count meta row with mt-1.5 spacing. Teal segment (--brand) for completed steps, blue segment (--accent-blue/60) for in-progress steps, proportional widths. Empty state shows gray background bar only. Follows h-1.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden flex pattern from runbook-view.tsx.
